title: T-bone steak – right on time

seo.title: T-bone steak - right on time - Marinda Kook

html:
Last night I had such a craving for steak that I couldn't wait for the fire to burn down. So I put the ridged pan on the stove and let it get nice and hot.

Before you put it in the pan. Don't pour the oil into the pan. Rub the steak with olive oil and season with spices of your choice. I used salt and pepper and Portuguese spice.

Once the pan is nice and hot, put your meat in the pan. Don't fiddle with it now. The meat should not be thinner than 2,5 cm.

  • medium/rare: 4 minutes a side (still quite pink inside)
  • medium: 5 minutes a side (pink inside)
  • well done: 6 -7 minutes a side (no pink, cooked through)

Turn it only once.

Now every man kisses his wife the way he prefers. Well, it's the same with your steak. I prefer salad with it and my husband, chips. Choose whatever's lekker for you.
